text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 9 

MORTALITIES 

LABEL: Count of AHCAH Mortalities During the Data Submission Period 

DESCRIPTION: The number of patients served by the hospital at home program who died during the data submission 
period, including those whose care was escalated to the hospital (excluding those on hospice or those 
for whom death was expected). 

SHORT NAME:
